name: Cambridge Armed Forces and Community Center
description: Cambridge Armed Forces and Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Cambridge, MN. There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. You can’t reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms and water.
fees: Fee required — Visitors can play for free once and must join CAPA ($20 annual) plus daily is $5 or monthly ticket for $30

name: Central Green Park
description: Central Green Park is a place to play pickleball in Cambridge, MN. There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Isanti Intermediate School Community Education
description: Courts are only available October to April. While school is in session.

name: Isanti Primary School
description: Isanti Primary School is a place to play pickleball in Isanti, MN. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Wintergreens Golf & Grill
description: Come play pickleball at Wintergreens Golf & Grill in Isanti, MN! There is 1 outdoor acrylic court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is private. Reservations are available. Players have access to food, lights, restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, and water.
